summary: BALLDONTLIE NBA API for querying teams, players, games, stats, standings, leaders, and box scores over HTTPS with API-key auth.

auth.instructions: Create an account at balldontlie.io and generate an API key from your dashboard. Send the key in the Authorization header on every request (Authorization: YOUR_API_KEY). The docs list Free, ALL-STAR, and GOAT tiers with different rate/credit limits and feature access.

endpoints.name: list-teams
endpoints.description: Returns NBA teams; supports filters by conference and division.

endpoints.name: list-players
endpoints.description: Returns players with cursor pagination and optional search/team filters.

endpoints.name: list-games
endpoints.description: Returns games with season/date/team filters and pagination.

endpoints.name: list-stats
endpoints.description: Returns player game stats with filters for players, games, seasons, and date ranges.

endpoints.name: get-standings
endpoints.description: Returns conference standings for a season (requires ALL-STAR or GOAT tier per docs).

endpoints.name: get-leaders
endpoints.description: Returns stat leaders for a season and stat category (requires ALL-STAR or GOAT tier per docs).

endpoints.name: get-box-scores
endpoints.description: Returns game box scores for a date (docs mark this as GOAT-tier access).
